description.zh: 一列被大雪困住的火车。一具无人见证的尸体。七个各怀秘密的乘客。
description.en: A train trapped by a blizzard. A body with no witnesses. Seven passengers, each hiding a secret.

text.zh: 1937年冬天。「华北特快」从上海出发，目的地北京。
text.en: Winter, 1937. The Northern Express departs Shanghai, bound for Beijing.

text.zh: 外面下着大雪，车里暖烘烘的。
text.en: Snow falls thick outside. Inside, the carriages are warm.

text.zh: 你叫陈问渠，退休刑警，这趟本来只是回家探亲。
text.en: Your name is Chen Wenqu — a retired detective, travelling home to see family. Nothing more.

text.zh: 七号车厢，七个陌生人。
text.en: Car Seven. Seven strangers.

text.zh: 餐车里，钻石商人柳明辉正拍着胸口炫耀。
text.en: In the dining car, the diamond merchant Liu Minghui holds court, thumping his chest with pride.

text.zh: 「这颗血月钻石，我从南非带回来的，值老钱了。」
text.en: "This Blood Moon diamond — I brought it back from South Africa myself. Worth a fortune."

text.zh: 旁边的大商人何大庆笑得满脸油光，跟他碰杯。
text.en: The wealthy merchant He Daqing grins, his face gleaming, and raises his glass.

text.zh: 角落里有个女人叫白芷芬，自己喝茶，一句话都不说。
text.en: In the corner, a woman named Bai Zhifen drinks her tea alone and says nothing at all.

text.zh: 英国人马修斯用破中文搭讪女演员钱露，钱露只是礼貌地笑笑。
text.en: The Englishman Matthews attempts conversation with the actress Qian Lu in halting Mandarin. She smiles politely and says little.

text.zh: 贺医生一直在看书，但柳明辉提到「血月」那一下，他的手抖了一下。
text.en: Dr. He has been reading all evening — but the moment Liu Minghui mentions the Blood Moon, the doctor's hand gives a small tremor.

text.zh: 晚上11点，大家各回各包厢。
text.en: At eleven o'clock, everyone retires to their compartments.

text.zh: 凌晨2点，走廊里传来一声压低的呼喊。
text.en: At two in the morning, a muffled cry rises from the corridor.

text.zh: 是列车员小陈，脸白得像纸。
text.en: It is the young attendant, Xiao Chen — his face drained white as a sheet.

text.zh: 「七号包厢柳先生死了。」
text.en: "Mr. Liu in Compartment Seven — he's dead."

text.zh: 你站在包厢门口，现场没人动过。第一步怎么做？
text.en: You stand at the compartment door. The scene is untouched. What is your first move?

optA.zh: 先翻柳明辉的皮质公文包

optB.zh: 叫贺医生进来，先确认死亡时间
optB.en: Call Dr. He in to establish the time of death

penalty.zh: 公文包上了锁，什么都没查到。更糟的是，你翻现场的动作被人看见了。线索断了，重来。
penalty.en: The briefcase is locked. Worse, someone sees you rifling through the scene. The lead goes cold. Start over.

hint.zh: 死亡时间是推理的起点，其他都往后排。
hint.en: Time of death is the foundation of any investigation. Everything else comes after.

text.zh: 贺医生蹲下来检查了一圈，站起来说
text.en: Dr. He crouches down, examines the body carefully, then rises.

text.zh: 「死亡时间在午夜12点到凌晨1点之间。」
text.en: "Time of death: somewhere between midnight and one in the morning."

text.zh: 「没有外伤。但枕头上有个压痕，位置不对劲。」
text.en: "No external wounds. But there is an impression on the pillow — in the wrong place entirely."

text.zh: 外面雪越下越大，前方铁轨被堵死了火车停了。
text.en: Outside, the snow intensifies. The tracks ahead are blocked. The train has stopped.

text.zh: 跑不了，也叫不到人。就我们这几个。
text.en: No one can flee. No help can be summoned. It is just us.

text.zh: 你挨个问了一遍，所有人都说自己在睡觉。
text.en: You question each of them in turn. Everyone claims to have been asleep.

text.zh: 小陈说，他最后见到柳先生是晚上11点，给他送了杯茶。
text.en: Xiao Chen says the last time he saw Mr. Liu was at eleven o'clock, when he delivered a cup of tea.

text.zh: 小陈答完想走，你发现他从头到尾左手都插在口袋里没拿出来过。
text.en: Xiao Chen answers and moves to leave. You notice he has kept his left hand in his pocket the entire time, never once taking it out.

optA.en: Let him go and question someone else

optB.zh: 拦住他，问那杯茶是谁让他送的
optB.en: Stop him and ask who told him to deliver that tea

penalty.zh: 后来你在茶杯底发现了白色沉淀，再去找小陈，他已经改口了。线索就这么断了。
penalty.en: Later you find a white residue at the bottom of the teacup. By then Xiao Chen has changed his story. The lead is gone.

hint.zh: 一直藏着一只手的人，心里有事。
hint.en: A man who keeps one hand hidden throughout has something to hide.

text.zh: 小陈停下来，额头开始冒汗。
text.en: Xiao Chen stops. Sweat breaks out on his forehead.

text.zh: 「是白太太说的，她说柳先生爱喝茉莉花茶，让我帮忙送过去。」
text.en: "It was Madame Bai. She said Mr. Liu was fond of jasmine tea, and asked me to bring him a cup."

text.zh: 白芷芬凭什么知道柳明辉喜欢喝什么茶？
text.en: How would Bai Zhifen know what tea Liu Minghui liked?

text.zh: 你把这个记下来了。
text.en: You make a note of it.

text.zh: 你去找白芷芬，她正蹲在地上捡珍珠，项链断了。
text.en: You go to find Bai Zhifen. She is kneeling on the floor, picking up pearls — her necklace has snapped.

text.zh: 「昨晚睡觉时扯断的，我睡了一整夜，什么都不知道。」
text.en: "It broke while I was sleeping last night. I slept the whole night through. I know nothing."

text.zh: 你看了眼地板珍珠全堆在靠走廊那边，不在床边。
text.en: You glance at the floor. The pearls are all gathered near the corridor side of the compartment — not beside the bed.

optA.zh: 不管，直接问她认不认识柳明辉
optA.en: Let it go and ask directly whether she knew Liu Minghui

optB.zh: 指出来：睡觉时断的话，珍珠应该在床边
optB.en: Point it out: if the necklace broke while she was in bed, the pearls should be near the bed

penalty.zh: 你没追这个，她很快就想好了另一套说法。等你反应过来，珍珠已经收走了。
penalty.en: You let it pass. She quickly constructs another explanation. By the time you think to look again, the pearls are gone.

hint.zh: 东西掉在哪，说明人站在哪。
hint.en: Where things fall tells you where the person was standing.

text.zh: 白芷芬眼神飘了一下，然后恢复平静。
text.en: Bai Zhifen's gaze flickers — then she composes herself.

text.zh: 「睡不着，我起来在门边站了一会儿，那时候断的。」她改口了。
text.en: "I couldn't sleep. I got up and stood by the door for a while — that's when it broke." She has changed her story.

text.zh: 她改得很快，但眼睛里有什么东西收紧了。
text.en: The revision comes quickly, but something tightens behind her eyes.

text.zh: 你注意到她茶杯里漂的，是茉莉花跟柳明辉包厢里一样的茶。
text.en: You notice the tea in her cup: jasmine — the same as the tea found in Liu Minghui's compartment.

text.zh: 何大庆正在包厢里骂火车停运，见你来，立刻凑上来。
text.en: He Daqing is in his compartment, cursing the delay. When he sees you, he immediately rushes over.

text.zh: 「凶手肯定是那个外国人！我昨晚亲耳听见争吵声，是外国口音！」
text.en: "The killer is obviously the foreigner! I heard an argument last night with my own ears — a foreign accent!"

text.zh: 何大庆说得有鼻子有眼的，还学起了外国口音。
text.en: He Daqing tells his story with theatrical conviction, even mimicking the foreign accent.

optA.zh: 先把马修斯当重点嫌疑人查
optA.en: Make Matthews the primary suspect and investigate him first

optB.zh: 追问他：几点听见的？他当时在走廊干嘛？
optB.en: Press him: what time did he hear it, and what was he doing in the corridor?

penalty.zh: 马修斯确实在走廊，但他是在谈古董生意，有人证。你跑偏了，真凶多争取了时间。
penalty.en: Matthews was indeed in the corridor, but he was negotiating an antique sale — there is a witness. You have wasted time, and the real killer has gained it.

hint.zh: 爆料爆得太积极的人，自己一般也有事要藏。
hint.en: The person most eager to point the finger usually has something to conceal themselves.

text.zh: 「大概十一点半吧，我去走廊抽烟。」他说完眼神飘开了。
text.en: "Around half past eleven. I went to the corridor for a smoke." His eyes drift away as he says it.

text.zh: 但他桌上没有烟灰缸，手指上也没有烟渍。
text.en: But there is no ashtray on his table, and his fingers bear no trace of tobacco.

text.zh: 你记得餐车里他还嫌别人抽烟呛人，扇了好几次手。
text.en: You remember him waving away someone else's smoke in the dining car, complaining it was choking him.

text.zh: 何大庆根本不抽烟。那他在走廊干嘛？
text.en: He Daqing doesn't smoke at all. So what was he doing in the corridor?

text.zh: 马修斯在收拾他的古董，神情很稳。
text.en: Matthews is packing away his antiques, his manner calm and unhurried.

text.zh: 「昨晚十一点四十五，我去餐车取了忘在那里的手套，十分钟就回来了。」
text.en: "Last night at a quarter to midnight I went to the dining car to collect a pair of gloves I had left there. I was back in ten minutes."

text.zh: 手套就搭在桌上，这条说得通。
text.en: The gloves are draped over the table. The account holds up.

text.zh: 贺医生的医药包放在公共走廊的行李架上，谁都能碰到。
text.en: Dr. He's medical bag sits on the luggage rack in the public corridor — within reach of anyone.

text.zh: 「昨晚我查了一遍，少了一瓶镇静剂。」贺医生自己主动说的。
text.en: "I checked my bag last night — a vial of sedative is missing." Dr. He volunteers the information himself.

text.zh: 贺医生眼神对上你的，没有回避，主动报告了镇静剂的事。
text.en: Dr. He meets your eyes without flinching and reports the missing sedative of his own accord.

optA.zh: 他最容易下药，先把他当嫌疑人
optA.en: He had the easiest access to the drug — treat him as the primary suspect

optB.zh: 镇静剂是被别人从走廊偷走的
optB.en: The sedative was stolen from the corridor by someone else

penalty.zh: 你把时间全花在贺医生身上，真凶趁机销毁了一样证据。贺医生后来是你最重要的帮手。
penalty.en: You spend all your time on Dr. He. The real killer uses the window to destroy a piece of evidence. The doctor will later become your most important ally.

hint.zh: 主动说自己出了差错的人，一般不是用这个差错犯罪的。
hint.en: A person who volunteers their own mistake is rarely the one who committed the crime with it.

text.zh: 「镇静剂溶进饮料，三十分钟内让人沉睡，之后如果」贺医生没说完。
text.en: "The sedative, dissolved in a drink, would induce sleep within thirty minutes. After that, if someone were to —" Dr. He does not finish the sentence.

text.zh: 你听懂了。药只是第一步。
text.en: You understand. The drug was only the first step.

text.zh: 柳明辉先被迷晕，然后被捂死的。
text.en: Liu Minghui was first rendered unconscious, then smothered.

text.zh: 你再检查了一遍包厢，暖气管后面摸出一张撕碎的纸。
text.en: You search the compartment again. Behind the heating pipe, your fingers find a torn piece of paper.

text.zh: 拼起来只剩半句话：「你毁了我家，你欠我一条命。」
text.en: Pieced together, it reads only half a sentence: "You destroyed my family. You owe me a life."

text.zh: 是女人的字，写得很用力，每一笔都带着压了很久的劲。
text.en: A woman's handwriting, pressed hard into the paper — every stroke carrying the weight of years.

text.zh: 车上女乘客就两个白芷芬和演员钱露。
text.en: There are only two female passengers: Bai Zhifen, and the actress Qian Lu.

optA.zh: 找个借口让白芷芬填张表，看她的字
optA.en: Find a pretext to have Bai Zhifen fill out a form and observe her handwriting

optB.zh: 先去问钱露，演员情绪化，更可能冲动犯案
optB.en: Question Qian Lu first — actresses are emotional, more likely to act on impulse

penalty.zh: 钱露的字飞扬洒脱，和那张纸完全不像。你绕了一圈，白芷芬那边准备好了。
penalty.en: Qian Lu's handwriting is bold and free — nothing like the note. You have taken a detour, and Bai Zhifen has had time to prepare.

hint.zh: 茉莉花茶、珍珠，所有线索已经指向同一个人了。
hint.en: The jasmine tea. The pearls. Every clue already points to the same person.

text.zh: 白芷芬填表时，你盯着她写字，心跳快了一拍。
text.en: As Bai Zhifen fills out the form, you watch her write. Your pulse quickens.

text.zh: 「命」这个字的钩，和信纸上写的一模一样。
text.en: The hook on the character for "life" — it is identical to the one on the torn note.

text.zh: 她感觉到了你的眼神，笔停在纸上没动。
text.en: She feels your gaze. Her pen stops on the page.

text.zh: 白芷芬胸口别着一枚月牙形的蓝宝石胸针。
text.en: Pinned to Bai Zhifen's chest is a crescent-shaped sapphire brooch.

text.zh: 你见过这枚胸针就在柳明辉昨晚炫耀的那本藏品册里。
text.en: You have seen that brooch before — in the collector's album Liu Minghui was showing off last evening.

text.zh: 白芷芬现在有点紧张，防线出现了裂缝。
text.en: Bai Zhifen is tense now. There are cracks in her composure.

optA.zh: 直接问她：「这枚胸针，哪来的？」
optA.en: Ask her directly: "Where did you get this brooch?"

optB.zh: 先不提，等再收集点证据
optB.en: Say nothing — wait until you have gathered more evidence

penalty.zh: 等你「准备好」，那枚胸针已经不见了，她的表情也恢复正常了。
penalty.en: By the time you feel "ready", the brooch has vanished and her expression has returned to perfect calm.

hint.zh: 防线松动的时候就是问的时候，等一下就晚了。
hint.en: When the defences crack, that is the moment to press. Wait even a moment and it will be too late.

text.zh: 她的手盖上了胸针。「我亡夫留给我的。」
text.en: Her hand moves to cover the brooch. "My late husband left it to me."

text.zh: 「你亡夫做什么的？」
text.en: "And what did your late husband do?"

text.zh: 「珠宝商，」她眼圈红了，「后来遇上了柳明辉。」
text.en: "He was a jeweller." Her eyes redden. "Then he crossed paths with Liu Minghui."

text.zh: 你终于看见了她那张平静脸背后的东西三年攒下来的恨。
text.en: At last you see what lies behind that composed face: three years of accumulated hatred.

text.zh: 白芷芬的丈夫三年前被柳明辉用假合同骗光了家底，半年后去世了。
text.en: Three years ago, Liu Minghui swindled Bai Zhifen's husband out of everything with a fraudulent contract. Her husband died six months later.

text.zh: 她一个人带着孩子，首饰都卖了。就这枚胸针没舍得。
text.en: She raised her child alone. Sold every piece of jewellery she owned. Only this brooch she could not bring herself to part with.

text.zh: 「他就坐在我旁边，」她的声音裂开了，「我等了三年。」
text.en: "He was sitting right there beside me." Her voice breaks. "I have waited three years."

text.zh: 她开始哭，哭得很安静，只有肩膀在动。
text.en: She begins to weep — quietly, silently, only her shoulders moving.

text.zh: 她的防线已经快撑不住了。你怎么做？
text.en: Her defences are nearly spent. What do you do?

optA.zh: 把那张拼好的纸放到她面前
optA.en: Place the reassembled note on the table in front of her

optB.zh: 告诉她镇静剂的事，施压
optB.en: Confront her with the sedative and apply pressure

penalty.zh: 她说：「我不知道什么镇静剂。」镇静剂是间接证据，这一招没用。
penalty.en: "I don't know anything about a sedative," she says. The sedative is circumstantial. The tactic fails.

hint.zh: 自己写的字摆在面前，比任何指控都更难否认。
hint.en: Words written in one's own hand, placed before one's own eyes, are harder to deny than any accusation.

text.zh: 白芷芬看着那张纸，很久没说话。
text.en: Bai Zhifen stares at the note for a long time without speaking.

text.zh: 「我本来只想让他睡着，把那颗钻石要回来，」她说，声音很轻，「给白正清。」
text.en: "I only meant to put him to sleep — to take back the diamond," she says, her voice barely above a whisper. "For Bai Zhengqing."

text.zh: 「但我看着他睡着的脸，想到了白正清最后那段日子」
text.en: "But when I looked at his sleeping face, I thought of Bai Zhengqing's last days —"

text.zh: 她停下来，看着你，话还没说完。
text.en: She stops. She looks at you. The sentence is unfinished.

optB.zh: 马上叫列车长，联系前面站点的警察
optB.en: Go immediately to fetch the conductor and contact the police at the next station

penalty.zh: 你带着列车长回来，她已经恢复正常了。「我不知道您在说什么。」
penalty.en: By the time you return with the conductor, she has composed herself completely. "I have no idea what you are referring to."

hint.zh: 没说完的话，就是最完整的供词。
hint.en: An unfinished sentence is the most complete confession of all.

text.zh: 「我没有停下来。」
text.en: "I did not stop myself."

text.zh: 窗外山上积了厚厚的雪，白得干净。
text.en: Outside, the mountains are buried deep in snow — clean and white and silent.

text.zh: 列车长要你给出正式结论。柳明辉怎么死的？
text.en: The conductor requires your official conclusion. How did Liu Minghui die?

optA.zh: 茶里的镇静剂剂量太大，直接毒死的
optA.en: The sedative in the tea was an overdose — he was poisoned directly

optB.zh: 先被镇静剂迷晕，再被枕头捂死的
optB.en: He was first rendered unconscious by the sedative, then smothered with the pillow

penalty.zh: 贺医生摇头：「那点量，只够睡几小时。」你没认真听他最开始说的话。
penalty.en: Dr. He shakes his head. "That dose would only induce sleep for a few hours." You were not listening carefully enough at the start.

hint.zh: 贺医生提过枕头有个奇怪的压痕那不是睡觉压出来的。
hint.en: Dr. He mentioned an unusual impression on the pillow. That kind of mark is not made by sleep.

text.zh: 列车长点了头，让乘务员把白芷芬的包厢门锁上。
text.en: The conductor nods and instructs the attendant to lock Bai Zhifen's compartment door.

text.zh:
天亮了，火车重新动了起来。
雪地被太阳一照，反着金光。

你合上了本子。

案子破了。
text.en:
Dawn comes. The train begins to move again.
Sunlight strikes the snow and turns it gold.

You close your notebook.

The case is solved.
